 2=One person physical assist

240 G0300A_BAL_SEAT_STNDG_CD G0300A_BAL_SEAT_STNDG_CD G0300A Balance During Seated to Standing Position Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's balance while moving from a seated to standing position. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Steady at all times
1=Not
